name: spectre-icons
description: WordPress plugin that adds bundled and uploaded SVG icon libraries to Elementor's icon picker, with per-library enable/disable controls.

scripts.check: composer validate --no-check-lock && composer test && composer lint
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:e2e:elementor && npm run test:e2e:my-icons
scripts.wp-env:install-elementor: npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin install elementor --version=3.29.2 --force --activate --skip-plugins --skip-themes
scripts.wp-env:activate-plugin: npx wp-env run cli -- wp plugin activate spectre-icons --skip-plugins --skip-themes
scripts.test:e2e:setup: npm run wp-env:start && npm run wp-env:install-elementor && npm run wp-env:activate-plugin

author: PHCDevworks
